channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: 'Wait Wait' for March 7, 2026: With Not My Job guest Jason Benetti
item.description: This week, Wait Wait is live in Chicago with host Peter Sagal, special guest Jason Benetti and panelists Luke Burbank, Negin Farsad, and Hari Kondabolu
item.content:encoded: This week, Wait Wait is live in Chicago with host Peter Sagal, special guest Jason Benetti and panelists Luke Burbank, Negin Farsad, and Hari Kondabolu

item.title: Questioning Georgia O'Keefe's legacy and protecting the land in northern New Mexico
item.description: Georgia O'Keeffe claimed New Mexico's desert "my country." But Pueblo peoples lived on the land long before the artist arrived. There's a push for a more complex view of O'Keeffe and her time there.
item.content:encoded: Georgia O'Keeffe claimed New Mexico's desert "my country." But Pueblo peoples lived on the land long before the artist arrived. There's a push for a more complex view of O'Keeffe and her time there.
item.dc:creator: John Burnett

item.title: Netflix acquires Ben Affleck's AI company
item.description: Affleck's company helps filmmakers build their own AI models that take care of time-intensive details.
item.content:encoded:
'/>

Affleck's company helps filmmakers build their own AI models that take care of time-intensive details.

(Image credit: Clive Mason)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: Your Winter Paralympics primer: What, who and how to watch
item.description: Hundreds of para athletes are competing in Italy through March 15. Many Americans are defending past titles, with the U.S. sled hockey team hoping to fend off rival Canada for its fifth straight gold.
item.content:encoded:
Hundreds of para athletes are competing in Italy through March 15. Many Americans are defending past titles, with the U.S. sled hockey team hoping to fend off rival Canada for its fifth straight gold.

(Image credit: Mattia Ozbot)
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: Olympian Alysa Liu has also inspired fans off the ice — in the hair salon
item.description: The gold medal-winning figure skater came to the Milano Cortina winter games with a distinctive "raccoon" hairstyle — alternating rings of dark and light hair. Now, fans are following her lead.
item.content:encoded: The gold medal-winning figure skater came to the Milano Cortina winter games with a distinctive "raccoon" hairstyle — alternating rings of dark and light hair. Now, fans are following her lead.
item.dc:creator: Mika Ellison

item.title: 'Dopamine Kids' explains why children crave screens and helps them enjoy life instead
item.description: A mom and science writer offers an operating manual for parents grappling with kids' screen use and cravings for sweets.
item.content:encoded: A mom and science writer offers an operating manual for parents grappling with kids' screen use and cravings for sweets.
item.dc:creator: Alicia Garceau

item.title: 'Hoppers' is delightfully unhinged and a dam good time
item.description: A young environmental activist transforms herself into a beaver in this off-the-wall eco-themed comedy. It's the liveliest film to emerge from Pixar in years.
item.content:encoded:
Hoppers.'/>

A young environmental activist transforms herself into a beaver in this off-the-wall eco-themed comedy. It's the liveliest film to emerge from Pixar in years.
item.dc:creator: Justin Chang

item.title: Move over, Europe? Cadillac arrives in F1 as 'America's team'
item.description: Cadillac isn't the first American team at the pinnacle of motorsport, but they're embracing that identity.
item.content:encoded:
Cadillac isn't the first American team at the pinnacle of motorsport, but they're embracing that identity.

(Image credit: Joe Portlock/Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Adam Bearne

item.title: No matter what happens at the Oscars, Delroy Lindo embraces 'the joy of this moment'
item.description: Lindo is nominated for best supporting actor for his role in Sinners. At the BAFTA awards on Sunday, Lindo was presenting when a man with Tourette syndrome in the audience yelled out a racial slur.
item.content:encoded:
Lindo is nominated for best supporting actor for his role in Sinners. At the BAFTA awards on Sunday, Lindo was presenting when a man with Tourette syndrome in the audience yelled out a racial slur.

(Image credit: Rebecca Cabage)
item.dc:creator: Tonya Mosley

item.title: If you loved 'Frankenstein,' here's what to watch next
item.description: So you loved Frankenstein. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations. You suggested other stories of men and monsters, plus your Guillermo del Toro favorites.
item.content:encoded:
So you loved Frankenstein. What should you watch next? We asked our audience to share their recommendations. You suggested other stories of men and monsters, plus your Guillermo del Toro favorites.

(Image credit: Ken Woroner)
item.dc:creator: Beth Novey
